---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstan)

df <- read_csv("flips.csv")

```

```{r}
df %>%
    mutate(Outcome = factor(
        ifelse(Heads == 1, "Heads", "Tails"),
        levels = c("Heads", "Tails") 
    )) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Stream, fill = Outcome)) +
    geom_bar()+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(title = "Heads/Tails Distribution Over 2 Streams", x = "Stream", y = "Outcome Distribution")
```


```{r}
set.seed(253)

stan_data <- list(
  y1 = sum(df$Heads[df$Stream == 1]),
  n1 = sum(df$Stream == 1),
  y2 = sum(df$Heads[df$Stream == 2]),
  n2 = sum(df$Stream == 2)
)

fit <- stan(
  file   = "coin_model.stan",
  data   = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter   = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 42
)

print(fit, pars = c("theta1", "theta2"))

samples <- extract(fit)

cat("Posterior mean theta1:", mean(samples$theta1), "\n")
cat("Posterior mean theta2:", mean(samples$theta2), "\n")

cat("95% CI theta1:", quantile(samples$theta1, c(0.025, 0.975)), "\n")
cat("95% CI theta2:", quantile(samples$theta2, c(0.025, 0.975)), "\n")

```

```{r}

traceplot(fit)

```

```{r}

ci_df <- data.frame(
  param = c("theta1", "theta2"),
  mean  = c(mean(samples$theta1), mean(samples$theta2)),
  lower = c(quantile(samples$theta1, 0.025), quantile(samples$theta2, 0.025)),
  upper = c(quantile(samples$theta1, 0.975), quantile(samples$theta2, 0.975))
)

```

```{r}

ggplot(ci_df, aes(x = mean, y = param)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), width = 0.1) +
  xlim(0.73, 1)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, aes())+
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "95% Posterior Credible Interval",
       y = "Parameter", x = "Value")

```


```{r}
# Define the Parameters & Data
alpha_prior <- 1.2
beta_prior <- 0.2

# Data from the streams
y1 <- 0  # 0 cats in stream 1
y2 <- 1  # 1 cat in stream 2

# Calculations for true density (for comparison visualization only)
alpha_post <- alpha_prior + 1
beta_post <- beta_prior + 2

# Define the Log-Posterior Function
log_posterior_fn <- function(lambda) {
  likelihood <- dpois(y1, lambda) * dpois(y2, lambda)
  prior <- dgamma(lambda, shape = alpha_prior, rate = beta_prior)
  posterior <- likelihood * prior
  return(log(posterior))
}

# Run the optimization
initial_guess <- 1
fit <- optim(par = initial_guess, 
             fn = log_posterior_fn, 
             method = "BFGS", 
             control = list(fnscale = -1),
             hessian = TRUE)

# Negate the Hessian to find Variance
lambda_map <- fit$par

# Since we maximized the log-posterior, fit$hessian is the true Hessian (H).
# We negate it (-H) and invert it to get the variance.
laplace_var <- solve(-fit$hessian)
laplace_sd <- sqrt(as.numeric(laplace_var))

cat("Mode (Lambda MAP):         ", round(lambda_map, 5), "\n")
cat("Variance (Lambda):         ", round(as.numeric(laplace_var), 5), "\n")
cat("Standard Deviation:       ", round(laplace_sd, 5), "\n\n")
```

```{r}
# Viz
x_vals <- seq(-1, 4, length.out = 500)

# Calculate the densities
true_density <- dgamma(x_vals, shape = alpha_post, rate = beta_post)
laplace_density <- dnorm(x_vals, mean = lambda_map, sd = laplace_sd)

# Plot the True Posterior
plot(x_vals, true_density, type = "l", lwd = 3, col = "blue",
     main = "Laplace Approx: 2 Streams (1 Cat Total)",
     xlab = "Rate of Feral Cats (lambda)", ylab = "Density",
     xlim = c(-1, 3.5), ylim = c(0, max(true_density, laplace_density) + 0.1))

# Overlay the Laplace Approximation
lines(x_vals, laplace_density, lwd = 3, col = "red", lty = 2)

# Add a vertical line at zero to show the impossible domain
abline(v = 0, lwd = 2, lty = 3, col = "black")

# Add a legend
legend("topright", legend = c("True Gamma Posterior", "Laplace Normal Approx", "Physical Boundary (0)"),
       col = c("blue", "red", "black"), lty = c(1, 2, 3), lwd = 2)

# Print out the impossible negative probability mass
prob_negative <- pnorm(0, mean = lambda_map, sd = laplace_sd)
cat("\nUpdated Mean (MAP):", round(lambda_map, 3))
cat("\nUpdated Standard Deviation:", round(laplace_sd, 3))
cat("\nProbability mass assigned to impossible negative values:", round(prob_negative * 100, 2), "%\n")
```
